# Future story template

Used by **story-create §A**. Path: `docs/kanban/future/<slug>.md`.

No `S##-##-` prefix. No story id. Free-form, but include `## Kind`.

```markdown
# <Title>

## Kind

Investigation / idea / spike — not on the numbered roadmap.

## Context

<What prompted this idea; what problem it might solve.>

## Questions or opportunities

- <Open question or potential direction.>

## Promotion

When actionable: move to `unplanned/S##-##-<slug>.md` with full
unplanned sections (see `story-unplanned.md`).
```
